Yama does not have any lord associated with.
It should also be noted that as per Prasnamarga last yama
is owned by Rahu and the distribution ofYamas is as follows.
This is the Kerala system (especially '!sed for calculating
Rahukala).
Table 3: Yama lords as per Prasnamarga
Week day I 2 3 4 5 6 7 8
Sunday Su Mo Ma Me Ju Ve Sa Ra
Monday Mo Ma Me Ju Ve Sa Ra Su
Tuesday Ma Me Ju Ve Sa Ra Su Mo
Wednesday Me Ju Ve Sa Ra Su Mo Ma
Thursday Ju Ve Sa Ra Su Mo Ma Me
Friday Ve Sa Ra Su Mo Ma Me Ju
Saturday Sa Ra Su Mo Ma Me Ju Ve
There is one more system of calculating yama popularised
by Tamil and Srilankan astrologers as given below.

28 Secrets of Birth Time Rectification
Table 4: Y ama lords as per Tamil I Srilankan
Week day 1 2 3 4 .5 6 7 8
Sunday Su Ma Jti Me Ve Sa Mo Ra
Monday Mo Ra Su Ma Ju Me Ve Sa
Tuesday Ma Ju Me Ve Sa Mo Ra Su
Wednesday Me Ve Sa Mo Ra Su Ma Ju
Thursday Ju Me Ve Sa Mo Ra Su Ma
Friday Ve Sa Mo Ra Su Ma Ju Me
